mapper.sql: kai.id, kai.attribute1, kai.attribute2, kai.attribute3, kai.attribute4, kai.attribute5, kai.serial_number, kai.kpi_annual_id, kai.assessed_department_id, kai.assessed_department_name, kai.examine_type, kai.target_dimension, kai.key_performance_indicator, kai.define, kai.weight, kai.threshold, kai.target_value, kai.challenge_value, kai.examine_department_id, kai.examine_employee_id, kai.examine_department_name, kai.examine_employee_name, kai.create_time, kai.create_by, kai.update_time, kai.update_by, kai.year, kai.enabled_flag, kai.data_type, kai.data_accuracy, ka.examine_status,kai.examine_employee_work_card

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.serial_number as ${tAlias}_serial_number, ${tAlias}.kpi_annual_id as ${tAlias}_kpi_annual_id, ${tAlias}.assessed_department_id as ${tAlias}_assessed_department_id, ${tAlias}.assessed_department_name as ${tAlias}_assessed_department_name, ${tAlias}.examine_type as ${tAlias}_examine_type, ${tAlias}.target_dimension as ${tAlias}_target_dimension, ${tAlias}.key_performance_indicator as ${tAlias}_key_performance_indicator, ${tAlias}.define as ${tAlias}_define, ${tAlias}.weight as ${tAlias}_weight, ${tAlias}.threshold as ${tAlias}_threshold, ${tAlias}.target_value as ${tAlias}_target_value, ${tAlias}.challenge_value as ${tAlias}_challenge_value, ${tAlias}.examine_department_id as ${tAlias}_examine_department_id, ${tAlias}.examine_employee_id as ${tAlias}_examine_employee_id, ${tAlias}.examine_department_name as ${tAlias}_examine_department_name, ${tAlias}.examine_employee_name as ${tAlias}_examine_employee_name, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.data_accuracy as ${tAlias}_data_accuracy, ${tAlias}.data_type as ${tAlias}_data_type, ${tAlias}.year as ${tAlias}_year, ${tAlias}.examine_employee_work_card as ${tAlias}_examine_employee_work_card

select
from kpi_assessment_indicators kai left join kpi_annual ka on kai.kpi_annual_id = ka.id

select
,fdev.ext_dept_name AS assessed_dept_name ,fdev.ext_department_name AS assessed_department ,fdev.ext_team_name AS assessed_team ,(select CASE WHEN exists (select 1 from fnd_user fu where kai.create_by = fu.id and fu.employee_id = #{criteria.currentEmployeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as create_by_flag ,(select pe.name from fnd_user fu,pm_employee pe where kai.create_by = fu.id and pe.id = fu.employee_id and fu.id = kai.create_by ) as create_by_name ,(select a.dept_name from kpi_department_tree a join kpi_department_tree b on a.dept_id = b.parent_id and a.year=b.year where b.id = kai.assessed_department_id ) as parent_department from kpi_assessment_indicators kai left join kpi_annual ka on kai.kpi_annual_id = ka.id left join pm_employee pe on pe.id = kai.examine_employee_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 left join fnd_user fu on fu.id = kai.create_by and fu.enabled_flag = 1 left join kpi_department_tree kdt on kdt.id = kai.assessed_department_id left join fnd_dept_ext_v fdev ON kdt.dept_id = fdev.id AND fdev.enabled_flag = 1 AND fdev.deleted_flag = 0
mapper.insert: insert into kpi_assessment_indicators (attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, serial_number, kpi_annual_id, assessed_department_id,assessed_department_name, examine_type, target_dimension, key_performance_indicator, define, weight, threshold, target_value, challenge_value, examine_department_id, examine_employee_id, examine_department_name, examine_employee_name, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, year, enabled_flag,data_accuracy,data_type,examine_employee_work_card) values (#{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{serialNumber,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{kpiAnnualId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{assessedDepartmentId,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{assessedDepartmentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{examineType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetDimension,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{keyPerformanceIndicator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{define,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{weight,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{threshold,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{challengeValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{examineDepartmentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{examineEmployeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{examineDepartmentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{examineEmployeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{year,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, #{dataAccuracy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{dataType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{examineEmployeeWorkCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update kpi_assessment_indicators set attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, serial_number = #{serialNumber,jdbcType=BIGINT}, kpi_annual_id = #{kpiAnnualId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, assessed_department_id = #{assessedDepartmentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, assessed_department_name = #{assessedDepartmentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, examine_type = #{examineType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, target_dimension = #{targetDimension,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, key_performance_indicator = #{keyPerformanceIndicator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, define = #{define,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, weight = #{weight,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, threshold = #{threshold,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, target_value = #{targetValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, challenge_value = #{challengeValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, examine_department_id = #{examineDepartmentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, examine_employee_id = #{examineEmployeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, examine_department_name = #{examineDepartmentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, examine_employee_name = #{examineEmployeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, year = #{year,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, data_accuracy = #{dataAccuracy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_type = #{dataType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, examine_employee_work_card = #{examineEmployeeWorkCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(YEAR) FROM kpi_assessment_indicators and enabled_flag = 1
select MAX(serial_number) from kpi_assessment_indicators where year = #{year,jdbcType = BIGINT} and enabled_flag = 1

select 1 where exists( select 1 from kpi_department_tree kdt join pm_employee_job pej on kdt.admin_job_id = pej.job_id and pej.enabled_flag=1 join pm_employee pe on pe.id = pej.employee_id and pe.leave_flag = 0 left join kpi_department_tree_employee kdte on kdt.id= kdte.department_tree_id left join pm_employee a on a.id = kdte.employee_id and a.leave_flag = 0 where pe.work_card = #{workCard,jdbcType = VARCHAR} or a.work_card = #{workCard,jdbcType = VARCHAR})

SELECT kdt.id, kdt.year, kdt.dept_id, kdt.dept_name, kdt.parent_id, ( SELECT TOP 1 dept_name FROM kpi_department_tree WHERE dept_id = kdt.parent_id ORDER BY year DESC) AS parentName, kdt.admin_job_id, pe.name, pej.job_name, CONVERT(VARCHAR, DATEFROMPARTS(#{year}, 1, 1), 120) + '至' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, DATEFROMPARTS(#{year}, 12, DAY(EOMONTH(#{year}))), 120) AS DateRange FROM kpi_department_tree AS kdt INNER JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON pej.job_id = kdt.admin_job_id INNER JOIN pm_employee pe ON pe.id = pej.employee_id WHERE kdt.assessed_department_flag= 1 AND kdt.year = #{year} AND kdt.dept_level LIKE '%科室%' AND pej.enabled_flag = 1 AND pe.leave_flag = 0 AND pe.enabled_flag= 1

SELECT kai.id, kai.year, kai.serial_number, kai.kpi_annual_id, kai.assessed_department_name, kai.assessed_department_id, kai.examine_type, kai.target_dimension, kai.key_performance_indicator, kai.define, kai.weight, kai.threshold, kai.target_value, kai.challenge_value, kai.examine_department_id, kai.examine_department_name, kai.examine_employee_name, kai.examine_employee_work_card, kai.examine_employee_id, kai.data_type, kai.target_dimension FROM kpi_assessment_indicators AS kai WHERE year = #{year} AND enabled_flag = 1 AND examine_type LIKE #{contextType} AND assessed_department_id = #{Id} GROUP BY kai.target_dimension, kai.id, kai.year, kai.serial_number, kai.kpi_annual_id, kai.assessed_department_name, kai.assessed_department_id, kai.examine_type, kai.target_dimension, kai.key_performance_indicator, kai.define, kai.weight, kai.threshold, kai.target_value, kai.challenge_value, kai.examine_department_id, kai.examine_department_name, kai.examine_employee_name, kai.examine_employee_work_card, kai.examine_employee_id, kai.data_type

SELECT kdt.id, kdt.year, kdt.dept_id, kdt.dept_name, kdt.parent_id, ( SELECT TOP 1 dept_name FROM kpi_department_tree WHERE dept_id = kdt.parent_id ORDER BY year DESC) AS parentName, kdt.admin_job_id, pe.name, pej.job_name, CONVERT(VARCHAR, DATEFROMPARTS(#{year}, 1, 1), 120) + '至' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, DATEFROMPARTS(#{year}, 12, DAY(EOMONTH(#{year}))), 120) AS DateRange FROM kpi_department_tree AS kdt INNER JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON pej.job_id = kdt.admin_job_id INNER JOIN pm_employee pe ON pe.id = pej.employee_id WHERE kdt.assessed_department_flag= 1 AND kdt.year = #{year} AND kdt.dept_level LIKE '%部%' AND pej.enabled_flag = 1 AND pe.leave_flag = 0 AND pe.enabled_flag= 1

SELECT kai.id, kai.year, kai.serial_number, kai.kpi_annual_id, kai.assessed_department_name, kai.assessed_department_id, kai.examine_type, kai.target_dimension, kai.key_performance_indicator, kai.define, kai.weight, kai.threshold, kai.target_value, kai.challenge_value, kai.examine_department_id, kai.examine_department_name, kai.examine_employee_name, kai.examine_employee_work_card, kai.examine_employee_id, kai.target_dimension FROM kpi_assessment_indicators AS kai WHERE year = #{year} AND enabled_flag = 1 AND examine_type = #{contextType} AND assessed_department_id = #{Id} GROUP BY kai.target_dimension, kai.id, kai.year, kai.serial_number, kai.kpi_annual_id, kai.assessed_department_name, kai.assessed_department_id, kai.examine_type, kai.target_dimension, kai.key_performance_indicator, kai.define, kai.weight, kai.threshold, kai.target_value, kai.challenge_value, kai.examine_department_id, kai.examine_department_name, kai.examine_employee_name, kai.examine_employee_work_card, kai.examine_employee_id, kai.data_type
